title.en: Soon, the second Supreme One was killed, and th...

content.en:
After the first Supreme One was killed, the other Supreme Beings were almost unable to withstand Ye Tian's attack one by one.

Soon, the second Supreme One was killed, and the third Supreme One was killed.

The gap between their strength and Ye Tian was too big, like a world apart.

Otherwise, the difference in strength was not large, and it would be very difficult for Ye Tian to kill them.

Soon.

There are only two of the top ten supreme beings of the Gu Star Clan, Donghe and Gu Shen, but they are also seriously injured and can't hold out for long.

"Why?"

Gu Shen asked.

He really didn't understand, what was the benefit of killing them, even if he was really unwilling to release the Star Ancestor, then he wouldn't want to kill them!

But Ye Tian was bent on killing them and not giving them a chance to surrender.

Gu Shen couldn't think of a reason, and Ye Tian wouldn't explain it to them.

Thundered!!!!!

In the midst of their battle, this ancient star, which completely belonged to Ye Tian, completely turned into dust.

Time and space shattered, rules were annihilated, and endless onslaught swept across the surrounding territory, but under the suppression of Zhenkong Xinghe, their battle was confined to a small area, and it was difficult to transmit it, so there was no other supreme to support.

However, even if they came to help, they could not be saved.

After all, even the top ten supreme beings have been defeated, what can those ordinary supreme beings do?

After another while, Gu Shen's body shattered into pieces, he could no longer heal, and the vitality in his body completely dissipated.

Ancient sinking, falling.

At this time, Donghe was really scared, and he didn't want to die.

After all, he exists forever, has an infinite lifespan, and is one of the ten supreme beings of the ancient star clan, with a high position and a comfortable life, he naturally doesn't want to fall.

"Xuchen, please spare me, I am willing to be loyal to you forever!"

Donghe pleaded.

However, Ye Tian ignored Donghe's pleas for mercy.

Rumble!!!!

With a punch, the terrifying power directly shattered Donghe's body, directly killing Donghe, who was severely injured and dying.

At this point, the ten supreme beings of the ancient star clan all died.

After the fall of these supreme beings, Ye Tian put away the Zhenkong Xinghe.

This source weapon was given to him by the Gu Xing Clan after he became the Supreme, and I have to say that this time it was thanks to this source weapon, otherwise the Ten Supreme Ones would have to run away from a few, and when the time came, it would be a little troublesome for him to completely rule the Gu Star Clan.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian summoned the other supreme beings of the Ancient Star Clan and a large number of first-class invincible people, these Ancient Star Clan people were all high-level members of the Ancient Star Clan, and he wanted to summon these Ancient Star Clan people to declare his status.

......

Ancient Star Clan Headquarters.

One after another, the Supreme One and a large number of first-class invincible people arrived, and they were very curious when they saw that there was only Ye Tian alone, but they didn't see the other ten Supreme Beings.

It stands to reason that such a meeting should not be the only one Ye Tian.

Moreover, Ye Tian also sat on the most core throne, and its meaning was already very clear.

Some of the Ancient Star Clansmen began to secretly contact the Ten Supremes, but they didn't suspect anything, they just wanted to ask why the Ten Supremes didn't come to the meeting.

But soon, their expressions changed.

They can't even contact the Ten Supreme Beings, and if they can't contact one, they can still be said to be in retreat, turning off their perceptions, regardless of external affairs.

But if you can't get in touch with all of them, that's a big problem.

At this time, the Supreme One of the Ancient Star Clan, Crowe, asked, "Lord Xuchen, Donghe and the other adults, I contacted them just now but couldn't get in touch. "

Ye Tian said lightly: "They are dead!"

"What, Lord Donghe, how could they die?"

Many of the Ancient Star Clansmen were shocked, and they couldn't believe it one by one.

At this time, Ye Tian continued: "The ten of them wanted to besiege me, but they underestimated my strength and were killed by me. "

"I don't believe it!" Crowe said angrily, "It's impossible for Lord Donghe to make a move on you!"

"Could it be that I killed them on purpose?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Crowe didn't speak, but the expression on his face obviously didn't trust Ye Tian.

This is also normal, after all, Ye Tiancai's rise has not been long ago, and he has lived with Donghe and other supreme beings for endless years.

Comparatively speaking, Crowe believed in Donghe more than Ye Tian.

"Donghe they have fallen, from today on, the Ancient Star Clan is under my control, and I am the patriarch of the Ancient Star Clan!"

Ye Tian announced.

"I don't agree!" retorted Crowe.

"Who else disagrees?" Ye Tian asked in a cold voice.

A strong man of the Ancient Star Clan stood up and said that he disagreed.

At this time, Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying force swept across the audience, locking on those Gu Star Clan powerhouses who disagreed.

In the next moment, these Ancient Star Clan powerhouses were crushed into powder one by one by the terrifying power.

Even a supreme person like Crowe was pinched and exploded by Ye Tian's hand, and he fell and died on the spot.

"Who else dares to object, this is the end!"

Ye Tian stood up and said.

Whoa!!!

A member of the Ancient Star Clan knelt down one after another and bowed, "I've seen the patriarch!"

That's right, they coaxed and didn't dare to resist Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian forcibly obtained the approval of the top level of the Ancient Star Clan.

In the following years, the news that Ye Tian became the patriarch of the Ancient Star Clan spread, and many of the Ancient Star Clan people were a little unconvinced, but their strength was too low, so they couldn't resist.

As some years passed, Ye Tian's prestige became greater and greater, so the entire Gu Xing Clan acquiesced in this matter, and after all, they couldn't resist.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian announced one more thing, that is, to block the ancient star stone space and not allow other clansmen to enter it.

This regulation aroused the opposition of many people, but after Ye Tian killed a group of Gu Xing clansmen, this regulation was implemented.

The consciousness of the Star Ancestor has always stayed in the Ancient Star Tower, so he does not understand the affairs of the outside world.

But as time passed, other people in the outside world never entered the Ancient Star Stone Space, and Xingzu also began to be suspicious.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Ancient Star Tower and wanted to ask the Star Ancestor, but the Star Ancestor asked directly: "Xu Chen, why haven't you seen a single Ancient Star Clan member enter the Ancient Star Stone Space all these years?"

Ye Tian said with a smile: "I discussed it with the other Supreme Beings and decided not to open the Ancient Star Stone Space in the future, and I am also ready to take the Ancient Star Stone away, after all, the Star Ancestor has already chosen me, and there is no need to continue to cultivate other geniuses of the Ancient Star Clan, after all, the resources of the Star Ancient Domain are limited, so it must be properly arranged." "

"I see!"

Xingzu nodded slightly, but didn't say anything.

Ye Tian stayed in the Ancient Star Tower for a few days, asked some questions, and then left the Ancient Star Tower.

When Ye Tian left, Xing Zu's face became extremely gloomy.

"Damn Xuchen, I cultivated you, you dare to have other thoughts!"

Xingzu was furious.

Although he didn't know what was going on in the outside world, it was definitely not a trivial matter, and Xu Chen would most likely betray him or even release him.

Xu Chen is his only hope to get out of trouble, he can't offend Xu Chen, otherwise he will tear his face just now.

Soon after.

Ye Tian took the Gu Xing Shi away from the Gu Xing Shi space, after all, he was going to study the fusion of the two eternal bodies for a period of time in the future, if he was successful, he would have to re-cultivate the copy body and promote to the Supreme Realm with the most perfect foundation, so he needed the Gu Xing Shi to re-cultivate the Gu Xing Eternal Body and promote it with a perfect and flawless Gu Star Eternal Body.

Therefore, he could not do without the Ancient Star Stone.
